config.note: Deployed linear-path verify SDPA (fa2sw_precache_kenyan, MAX_NUM_SEQS=1, SPLITKV_VERIFY=1, ONEGRAPH=1) micro-profiled at the real 3D split-KV M=8 shape; num_stages=3->2 bit-identity-gated. No serve change, no HF Job, no submission.

verdict.handoff_line: the deployed linear batch=8 verify SDPA does NOT match the #270 M=8 tree shape (MAX_NUM_SEQS=1: the M=8 is the K+1 chain rows of ONE sequence, and SPLITKV_VERIFY routes it to 3D split-KV TILE=16, not the 2D TILE=32 #270 measured; same kernel + same num_stages=3 default); applying num_stages=3->2 gives 1.018x kernel speedup (global head-512 3D) and +3.14% full-verify-pass speedup, bit-identical yes, -> honest realistic-ctx (~512) +1.29% / 487.8 TPS (loose ctx=2048 UB +3.36% / 497.7 TPS), vs fern #274's 493.96 static-K=4 honest ceiling, so the verify SDPA tune is NOT the one post-phi lever above 500 (even at the loose UB).
